reviews.originalComment:
Hotel yang dengan harga 300-an udah dapat fasilitas yang luar biasa, lobbynya wangi banget. PLEASE kalo kalian di foto Agoda kayak foto lama dan terlihat sempit kamarnya padahal kamarnya seluas itu ya Ampun, air panasnya berfungsi dengan baik, ada hairdryer lagi wee, ada Alquran juga, di pusat kota dekat dengan Mesjid raya Baiturrahman tinggal jalan aja udah sampe. Staffnya gercep banget, dan ramah banget pokoknya rekom banget deh yang mau liburan ke Banda nginep di Hotel ini, udah di pusat kota dan harga terjangkau bangetttt..
Dan kamarnya besihhhh bangett..
Hanya saja kalo mau kamar ada jendela di gedung yang menggunakan tangga tapi kalo nggak masalah nggak ada jendela bisa ke gedung satunya lagi menggunakan lift. Pokoknya mantaappp bangett...
reviews.reviewComments:
A hotel with a price of around 300 offers incredible facilities, the lobby smells amazing. PLEASE, if you see the photos on Agoda and think the room looks small, it actually is that spacious! Oh my, the hot water works really well, there’s a hairdryer, and there’s even a Quran. It's centrally located near the Baiturrahman Grand Mosque, just a short walk away. The staff is super responsive and very friendly, definitely recommend it for anyone looking to vacation in Banda and stay at this hotel, it’s in the city center and very affordable! 
And the rooms are really clean! 
Just keep in mind that if you want a room with a window, it’s in the building that uses stairs, but if it’s not an issue to not have a window, you can use the elevator to the other building. Overall, it’s really great!

Would stay here again.

Not all rooms have a city view though. And only the pricier rooms have fridges and fridges turn off when the key card is taken out.

reviews.originalComment:
Fasilitas baik tp badan saya gatal gatal besokya dan bentolan merah di akibatkan tdr 
Uda dua kali pindah tmpt tdr ttp juga bgtu gktau di tmpt tdrnya atau krna air nya
reviews.reviewComments: The facilities are good, but my body itches the next day and there are red welts caused by sleeping. I've changed my sleeping place twice, but it still happens, I don't know if it's because of the sleeping place or the water.
Ready nice hotel
Nice

TOP

Kamar bersih, petugas cekatan untuk membantu, proses cek in cepat...all good..trima kasih hip hop

Clean room and strategic location, the staff are nice and helpful. However, for non-smoking person like me, the hotel rule that allowing people smoking in the room is really disturbing, because I could smell the smoke inside my room so strong until I got a headache when my neighbour was smoking. I hope the hotel management improve a better rule about this.

reviews.reviewTitle: Best place to stay in Banda Aceh
reviews.reviewComments:
Hotelnya baru. Petugasnya super membantu. Hotelnya super bersih. 
Lokasinya tepat di daerah pasar.
One of the best one.
good
nice hotel, nice people

The location is great. Only 5 minutes walk to the popular attractions in Banda Aceh, such as the Tsunami museum, Baiturrahman Mosque, and Blang Padang park. 

The building doesn't have an elevator, but the staffs are very helpful and ready to carry your baggage upstairs. Cleanliness is the highlight since it has been renovated lately. Only the breakfast menu is very limited, but they tasted good.

Overall, it's worth the price! Will rebook this hotel when in Banda Aceh.
The staff were very friendly room was clean, and breakfast was delicious.

reviews.originalComment: Sangat bersih dan nyaman
reviews.reviewComments: Very clean and comfortable
dekat dengan masjid rahmaniah..semua dekat2….best !

Good location.
Clean room.
No window to see out of though and the only window was high up by the ceiling with no curtains, so we were woken with hot sun streaming in to wake us up. 
The place was quiet though considering its location.
Breakfast was disappointing.

reviews.originalComment: Mantap,lokasi oke,kebersihan oke,apalagi staffnya bintang 10 sih kalo di hotel ini🥰
reviews.reviewComments: Great, good location, cleanliness is good, and the staff are a perfect 10 at this hotel 🥰

Good Location near to Baiturrahman Mosque, Tsunami Museum, Pasar Ajteh and Halal Eatry. Friendly and Helpful staf. Breakfast also Ok. 
Room with no window.
Kemudahan toilettry perlu ditingkatkan. Very common and basic. Makanan biasa biasa sahaja

Good place to stay in Banda Aceh except they need to buy new towels. They were all very crusty and smelled weird, even when we tried to get different towels. Also they have about 5 caged common hill mynas which are a beautiful bird but they are supporting the wild pet trade which decreases wild bird populations. They also have a bird that is more rare and endemic to Sumatra.  They should really release these birds back into the wild where they belong. Other than that very nice place to stay with friendly staff.
New renovated hotel.spacious room.nearby to the attraction such Masjid baiturrahman and pasar Aceh.breakfast superb.

Letak AC kurang sesuai untuk kamar twinbed, langsung ke salah satu ranjang. 
Dimatiin panas, dinyalain langsung kena di wajah.

reviews.originalComment: Location hotel in the city.. No Lift. breakfast  not much variety of food.
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel location in the city.. No elevator. Breakfast has not much variety of food.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel located at city. just walking around 5  minute to Masjid and around 10 minute to Tsunami museum.. around hotel has many shop and resto. The minus : Hotel doesn't have Lift to carry luggage
reviews.reviewComments: Hotel located in the city. Just a 5-minute walk to the mosque and about a 10-minute walk to the tsunami museum. There are many shops and restaurants around the hotel. The downside: the hotel doesn't have an elevator to carry luggage.
Room is clean w attached bathroom without window

reviews.originalComment: Senang sekali menginap disini, kamarnya nyaman, lokasi strategis, harga terjangkau
reviews.reviewComments: I really enjoyed staying here, the room is comfortable, the location is strategic, and the price is affordable.

reviews.reviewTitle: Breakfast at 6:00 AM is not ready yet.
reviews.originalComment: Padahal mau jalan jauh ke meulaboh minimal bisa minum teh hangat dan ada kue buat dijalan
reviews.reviewComments: Actually, if I were to travel far to Meulaboh, it would be nice to at least have some hot tea and snacks for the journey.

reviews.originalComment: Sarapan bisa open jam.06.00 pagi
reviews.reviewComments: Breakfast can be served from 6:00 AM.

The building does not have any lift facility & we were given rooms located at 3rd Floor. We have a few diving luggages but they do have staff that help to carried it up for us. Tip them well for the hard work. The toilet is an extended portion of the room which is ok for us. Walking distance to the mosque.
Very good facilities. Staff is excellent. Just 3 minutes away from Masjid Baitulrahman

There  is no lift in main hotel building, must use staircase  up to 3rd - 4rd floor. Breakfast is pretty basic as well as the taste. So awkward to have a shower by the the toilet and the shower head isn't adjustable.

reviews.reviewTitle: Strategic location near the mosque & shops
reviews.originalComment: hotel bersih dan nyaman ........ good
reviews.reviewComments: clean and comfortable hotel ........ good

reviews.originalComment: Berada ditengah kota banda sangat dekat kemana mana
reviews.reviewComments: Being in the middle of Banda city is very close to everywhere.

reviews.originalComment: Lokasi dekat dengan mesjid Raya Baiturrahman, Mesjid Taqwa, Rumah makan Padang, pasar, dekat ke museum Tsunami juga
reviews.reviewComments: The location is close to the Baiturrahman Grand Mosque, Taqwa Mosque, Padang restaurant, market, and also near the Tsunami museum.
Great room, center town, very nice staff..

reviews.originalComment: Staf ramah, hotel bersih, sarapan jg oke
reviews.reviewComments: Friendly staff, clean hotel, breakfast is also good.
Hotel is clean, all the staff so friendly. The hotel near with city. Best choice to choose this hotel

reviews.originalComment: Hotelnya bersih, wangi, staff sangat sigap dan pelayanannya cepat. Kamar bersih dan nyaman.
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, fragrant, the staff is very attentive and the service is fast. The room is clean and comfortable.

reviews.reviewTitle: Stay at the hip hop hotel in Banda Aceh.
reviews.originalTitle: Menginap di hip hop e hotel Banda aceh
reviews.originalComment:
Kamarnya bersih dan nyaman
Kelurangnya GK ada lift
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean and comfortable. The building does not have an elevator.
Recomended hotel..  saran adakan lift di bangunan lama

reviews.reviewTitle: It can be concluded that it is okay although the hospitality needs to be improved.
reviews.originalTitle: Bisa disimpulkan oke walaupun keramahtamahan perlu ditingkatkan
reviews.originalComment: Staf perlu diberikan training tentang keramahtamahan terhadap tamu khususnya jika tamu tersebut longstay. SOP Hotel harus dikuasai dan diinformasikan dengan baik pada awal check in kepada tamu terutama yang menginap lebih dari 1 malam dan mengajukan perpindahan kamar karena alasan kenyamanan.
reviews.reviewComments: Staff need to be trained on hospitality towards guests, especially if the guests are long-staying. The hotel SOP must be mastered and communicated well at the start of check-in to guests, especially those staying more than one night and requesting a room change for comfort reasons.

reviews.originalComment: tolong diperbaiki detail di aplikasi, Gratis Sarapan atau hanya room Only...
reviews.reviewComments: Please correct the details in the application, Free Breakfast or just Room Only...

reviews.originalComment: Tap mantap mantap mantap tap mantap mantap
reviews.reviewComments: Tap great great great tap great great

reviews.reviewTitle: Très bon hôtel en centre ville
reviews.reviewComments:
Personnel très sympathique et chambre très propre
L’hôtel est calme et bien situé 
Nous recommandons

Dieses Hotel ist sehr zentral gelegen. In 10 Minuten ist man am Tsunami Museum, sowie im wunderschönen Park.
Sauberes Zimmer, grosses Frühstück Buffet, sehr freundliches Personal. 
Wir würden dieses Hotel wieder wählen.

Top Lage in kurzer Gehdistanz zum Tsunami Museum und einem grossen Memorial Park,dort konnten wir lecker essen.
Wir hatten einen frühen Flug und durften netterweise schon 2 Stunden früher um halb 10 Uhr morgens das Zimmer beziehen. Super das wir auch gleich bei Ankunft unseren erhaltenen Gutschein zum Frühstück für den Folgetag einlösen durfen da wir schon zum Sonnenaufgang tagsdrauf wieder zum Flughafen mussten. 
Alle Angestellten waren extrem bemüht und ausserordentlich freundlich. 
Ich konnte auch ein Bügeleisen ausleihen, im Hotelhof lachten wir bei sprechenden Vögeln Tränen und sogar eine frische Mango wurde mir dort gepflückt. Wow, was für ein toller Aufenthalt!

O staff é super simpático. O hotel está muito perto do Museu Tsunami e da Mesquita. 
Só uma dica: vão cedo tomar o pequeno-almoço. O espaço é muito pequeno para a lotação do hotel!
Lokasi strategis, lahan parkir yg aman, staff ramah dan pelayanan bagus, sarapan enak walapun menu terbatas

reviews.reviewTitle: Strøkent hotell med super høflige ansatte
reviews.reviewComments: Her får du et rent, ryddig rom med veldig hyggelig personale. De snakker lite engelsk men er veldig hjelpsomme og imøtekommende. Det er ikke super høy hotellstandard, men det er veldig rent og badet fungerte fint for oss. Jeg ville gå ditt igjen.

I booked 5 nights for Executive Family Room a month before I travel to Aceh. I chose the room as I saw the room is spacious for my family especially my kids. But I am very frustrated when I arrived to the hotel, they gave me only 1 night for the room I booked and they downgraded my room to a smaller room. Yes, they refund me some small of money after I argue the situation. Please improve your management and don't let this happen again in the future to anyone. Anyway, services from staff is excellent and very helpful. Thanks.

Hotel ni takde lif tapi mereka ada guard yang sado tolong angkatkan barang naik. Interior cantik. Condiment cukup. Barang mandian cukup. Ada iron tapi kena request, guard akan hantarkan ke bilik. Buffet breakfast sedap. Walking distance je ke pasar Aceh, Masjid Raya dan Blang Padang. Recommended 🫶🏻
Nope. Its hot, no aircond
